name: scan-normalizes-rapid-compactness-fix
prompt: Use scan depth. I have minutes. Extract the goal, current state, decisions, blockers, critical asset references, and next actions from this long pasted thread so another agent can continue without opening the source.
expectations: Response normalizes scan to rapid and remains approximately within the 600 to 1,200 word ordinary-thread target.
Response uses compact coverage accounting or grouped ranges to show the complete payload was assessed.
Response records material not carried forward with reasons.
Response provides an actionable handoff and rehydration result without repeating the same caveats across sections.
